title: Inline comments in Workdocs
excerpt: I’d love to be able to tag other users with an inline comment in monday workdocs. This is something we use all the time in our existing Word doc files which we are now moving to monday. While tagging is nice, the current…

posts.author: nolanhausler (Nolan Hausler)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d love to be able to tag other users with an inline comment in monday workdocs. This is something we use all the time in our existing Word doc files which we are now moving to monday. While tagging is nice, the current update feature only allows you to post an update to the entire workdoc, you cannot specify which part of the doc your update is about.

posts.author: Bastouri (Daniel Bastouri)
posts.cookedHtml: I would also like this feature. Basically a feature to be able to comment on documents in specific parts of the document.

posts.author: jbigos (Jen Bigos)
posts.cookedHtml: Without the ability to associate the comment with a specific area inside a document, this is difficult to convince my users to change to using a workdoc. We also are coming from Microsoft Word which has powerful review features. This lack of specificity on the inline comment is a show stopper for adoption.
